raw_consumer_statement: I placed an order online on Home DepotXXXX using my Home Depot credit card. It was for an item priced at XXXX  a vehicle scan tool XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. The item was suppose to be delivered to my address and it never arrived. I never physically received the item nor did I sign for anything which the shipper should have been required to collect considering the amount it costs. I contacted them numerous times and they refuse to help me and tell me I have to pay which is ridiculous to me. How do they expect me to pay for an item I never received?!!! Also the proof that they have ( picture ) of the item being delivered is not my house. I have proof to show that my front entrance is different than the one they claim to have as a XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) I decided to file a complaint with CFPB to get this resolved outside of court if not I will be seeking legal council and litigating against Home Depot Credit Services.
